title: photinia serrulata var. lindleyana
intro: Photinia serrulata var. lindleyana, also known as the Japanese photinia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from respiratory issues, and support for the immune system. The leaves and stems of Photinia serrulata var. lindleyana can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often prepared by drying the plant material and infusing it in hot water.
